items.name: Henesys Hair Style Coupon (REG)
items.description: Use it at Henesys Hair Salon to change your hair style randomly. (one-time use)

items.name: Kerning City Hair Style Coupon (REG)
items.description: Use it at Kerning City Hair Salon to change your hair style randomly. (one-time use)

items.name: Henesys Hair Style Coupon (VIP)
items.description: Use it at Henesys Hair Salon to change your hair to a style of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Kerning City Hair Style Coupon (VIP)
items.description: Use it at Kerning City Hair Salon to change your hair to a style of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Henesys Hair Color Coupon (REG)
items.description: Use it at Henesys Hair Salon to change your hair color randomly. (one-time use)

items.name: Kerning City Hair Color Coupon (REG)
items.description: Use it at Kerning City Hair Salon to change your hair color randomly. (one-time use)

items.name: Henesys Hair Color Coupon (VIP)
items.description: Use it on Henesys Hair Salon to change your hair to a color of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Kerning City Hair Color Coupon (VIP)
items.description: Use it at Kerning City Hair Salon to change your hair color of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Face Coupon (REG)
items.description: Use it at Henesys Plastic Surgery to change your face randomly. (one-time use)

items.name: Face Coupon (VIP)
items.description: Use it at Henesys Plastic Surgery to change your face to a style of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Henesys Skin Coupon
items.description: Use it at Henesys Skin-Care to change your skin to a color of your choice. (one-time use)

items.name: Transparent Face Accessory
items.description: Wear this if you want to make your face accessory invisible while still using all of the stats it possesses.

items.description: Wear this if you want to make your eye accessory invisible while still using all of the stats it possesses.

items.description: Flowing veil that brides wear on their Wedding Day.

items.description: While the character chats, the chat bubble is in pink.

items.name: Transparent Shield
items.description: Wear this if you want to make your shield invisible while still using all of the stats they possess.

items.name: Transparent Shoes
items.description: Wear this if you want to make your shoes invisible while still using all of the stats they possess.

items.name: Dual Plasma Blade
items.description: Can be equipped over any dagger.

items.name: Bouquet
items.description: A pretty bouquet that can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, or dagger.

items.name: Wooden Slingshot
items.description: A toy Wooden Slingshot that can be equipped over any bow.

items.name: Plastic Slingshot
items.description: A toy Plastic Slingshot that can be equipped over any bow.

items.name: Angel Wand
items.description: A sparkling magic wand that can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Yellow Candy Cane
items.description: A yellow candy cane that can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Red Candy Cane
items.description: A red candy cane that can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Green Candy Cane
items.description: A green candy cane that can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Santa Sack
items.description: A sack full of gifts that can be equipped over any two-handed axe or two-handed blunt weapon.

items.name: Tiger Paw
items.description: These sharp tiger claw gloves can be equipped over any claw.

items.name: Orange Toy Hammer
items.description: An orange toy hammer that can be equipped over any two-handed sword.

items.name: Pink Toy Hammer
items.description: A magenta toy hammer that can be equipped over any two-handed sword.

items.name: Yellow Spatula
items.description: A spatula used for cooking that can be equipped over any wand or staff.

items.name: Teddy Bear
items.description: An adorable teddy bear. This weapon skin can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Toy Rifle
items.description: Can be equipped over any crossbow.

items.name: Bug Net
items.description: A long Bug Net that can be equipped over any spear.

items.name: Picnic Basket
items.description: A Picnic Basket, filled with a packed lunch, that can be equipped over any dagger.

items.name: Pink Rabbit Puppet
items.description: A pink bunny that goes over any equipped claw.

items.name: Vanilla Ice Cream
items.description: A delicious-looking Vanilla Ice Cream that can be equipped over any dagger, wand, or staff.

items.name: Pillow
items.description: A very comfortable looking pillow. This weapon skin can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, or one-handed blunt weapon.

items.name: Lollipop
items.description: A swirly candy treat. This weapon skin can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Cupid's Bow
items.description: Can be equipped over any bow.

items.name: Cherub's Bow
items.description: Can be equipped over any bow.

items.name: Cupid's Crossbow
items.description: Can be equipped over any crossbow.

items.name: Blazing Sword
items.description: A blazing amber saber-style sword. This weapon skin can be equipped over any one-handed sword, one-handed axe, one-handed blunt weapon, two-handed sword, two-handed axe, two-handed blunt weapon, wand, or staff.

items.name: Donut
items.description: A warm, freshly-baked donut that goes over any equipped claw.

items.name: White Rabbit's Foot
items.description: A cute glove resembling a white rabbit's foot that goes over any equipped claw.

items.name: Megaphone
items.description: Shout to everyone in the channel your character is on with this megaphone. Only available for characters that are over Level 10.

items.name: Super Megaphone
items.description: Shout to everyone in the world your character is on with this megaphone. Only available for characters that are over Level 10.

items.name: Mushroom House Elf
items.description: Set up this special store on the Free Market, and this Elf, working as the Hired Merchant, will sell the items for the owner, even if the owner does not log on to the game.

items.name: Cashier: Teddy Bear Clerk
items.description: Set up this special store on the Free Market, and this Teddy Bear, working as the Hired Merchant, will sell the items for the owner, even if the owner does not log on to the game.

items.name: The Robot Stand
items.description: Set up this special store on the Free Market, and this Robot, working as the Hired Merchant, will sell the items for the owner, even if the owner does not log on to the game.

items.name: Homely Coffeehouse
items.description: Set up this special store on the Free Market, and this Coffeehouse, doubling as the Hired Merchant, will be a place that sells the items for the owner, even if the owner does not log on to the game. If an item is sold, the owner will be notified through the chat box.

items.name: Granny's Food Stand
items.description: Set up this special store on the Free Market, and this Granny, working as the Hired Merchant, will sell the items for the owner, even if the owner does not log on to the game. If an item is sold, the owner will be notified through the chat box.

items.name: Pet Name Tag
items.description:
Use this item to name your pet. If you call its name before making an order, your pet will respond much better to your command. 
 ex. Lucky, sit! 
Only letters and numbers can be used in names, and only 1 blank space is allowed in the text of the name.

items.name: Water of Life
items.description: A mysterious water gathered from the deepest valleys of Ellinia. It can extend a living pet's active time, and if you bring it to Mar the fairy in Ellinia, she can restore a pet that has turned into a doll.

items.name: Brown Kitty
items.description: They are quiet and gentle in nature, so they don't go craving for food too often. They don't seem to be too obedient of their owners.

items.name: Brown Puppy
items.description: They are outgoing and active in nature, so they can't sit still for a period of time, which makes them hungry often. They are very obedient of their owners.

items.name: Pink Bunny
items.description: They are well-behaved and quiet, so they don't need to be fed more than the usual amount. They are smart and obedient, but also stubborn.

items.name: Mini Kargo
items.description: They are very very active, so they get hungry pretty often. Very intelligent, they are quite obedient of their owners.

items.name: Black Kitty
items.description: They are quiet and gentle in nature, so they don't go craving for food too often. They don't seem to be too obedient of their owners.

items.name: White Bunny
items.description: They are well-behaved and quiet, so they don't need to be fed more than the usual amount. They are smart and obedient, but also stubborn.

items.name: Husky
items.description: Active, yet calm at times. Can be moderately fed. Very smart in general.

items.name: Black Pig
items.description: Very active and hungry at all times. Need to be fed often. Very friendly in nature, so it's easy to increase the level of closeness with them.

items.name: Panda
items.description: Calm, relaxed, and gentle. A very rare creature.

items.name: Dino Boy
items.description: A very adorable male baby dinosaur that is both active and unpredictable.

items.name: Dino Girl
items.description: A very adorable female baby dinosaur that is both active and unpredictable.

items.name: Snail
items.description: A snail that is really hard to figure out. The pet's skills will disappear once the magic duration ends.

items.name: Auto HP Potion Skill
items.description:
Allows your pet to use HP potions on you when you're hurting. 
Available to all pets that do not have this skill.

items.name: Auto MP Potion Skill
items.description:
Allows your pet to use MP potions on you when you're running dry. 
Available to all pets that do not have this skill.

items.name: Auto Move Skill
items.description:
Adds a skill that automatically picks up nearby items and mesos without having to move.
Can be used on pets with Meso Magnet or Item Pouch.

items.name: Expanded Auto Move Skill
items.description:
This scroll expands the pet's auto move by 3x.
Can only be used on pets with the Auto Move Skill. Cannot be stacked for use.

items.name: AP Reset Scroll
items.description: Resets all stats, excluding the AP invested in HP/MP.

items.name: SP Reset Scroll
items.description: When used, all skills except for beginner skills will be reset.

items.name: Storage Room 5-slot Coupon
items.description: Double-click to expand your Storage Room by 5 slots. You may have up to 150 slots.

items.name: Equip Tab 5-slot Coupon
items.description: Double-click to expand your Equip tab by 5 slots. You may have up to 150 slots.

items.name: Use Tab 5-slot Coupon
items.description: Double-click to expand your Use tab by 5 slots. You may have up to 150 slots.

items.name: Set-up Tab 5-slot Coupon
items.description: Double-click to expand your Set-up tab by 5 slots. You may have up to 150 slots.

items.name: Etc. Tab 5-slot Coupon
items.description: Double-click to expand your Etc tab by 5 slots. You may have up to 150 slots.

items.name: Regular Store Permit
items.description: Opens a regular store. Can be used in towns or the Free Market. Allows selling up to 16 items at once.

items.name: Summer Store Permit
items.description: A special-edition coupon that opens a sky blue tree store. Can be used in towns or the Free Market and sell up to 24 items at once. Available for a limited time only.

items.name: Pink Store Permit
items.description: A special-edition coupon that opens a pink tree store. Can be used in towns or the Free Market and sell up to 24 items at once. Available for a limited time only.

items.name: Fall Store Permit
items.description: A special-edition coupon that opens a orange tree store. Can be used in towns or the Free Market and sell up to 24 items at once. Available for a limited time only.

items.name: Spring Store Permit
items.description: A special-edition coupon that opens a green tree store. Can be used in towns or the Free Market and sell up to 24 items at once. Available for a limited time only.

items.name: Smiley Sun
items.description: A special effect in which you'll see a brightly smiling sun floating over you. On the KeyConfig, configure this on a button of your choice to turn the effect on/off.

items.name: Moon & the Stars
items.description: A special effect in which you'll see a brightly smiling moon floating around in a sea of stars over you. On the KeyConfig, configure this on a button of your choice to turn the effect on/off.

items.name: Colorful Rainbow
items.description: A special effect in which you'll see a rainbow in its full 7 colors floating next to you. Designate a HotKey to turn the effect on/off.

items.name: Little Devil
items.description: A special effect in which you'll see Lilly the cute little devil floating around next to you. Designate a HotKey to turn the effect on/off.

items.name: Underwater
items.description: A special effect that shows a submarine under the water.  Designate a HotKey to turn the effect on/off.

items.name: Snowy Snow
items.description: Sprinkles snow on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Sprinkled Flowers
items.description: Sprinkles flower on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Soap Bubbles
items.description: Sprinkles bubbles on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Snowflakes
items.description: Sprinkles icy snow on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Sprinkled Presents
items.description: Sprinkles presents on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Sprinkled Chocolate
items.description: Sprinkles chocolate on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Sprinkled Flower Petals
items.description: Sprinkle flower petals on the map where your character is for 30 seconds. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Sprinkled Candy
items.description: Rains a sweet shower of candy sprinkles all over the map and displays a message of your choosing for 30 seconds!

items.name: Sprinkled Maple Leaves
items.description: Sprinkles maple leaves on the map where your character is for 30 sec. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: Fireworks
items.description: Ignites fireworks on the map where your character is for 30 sec. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: GM's Blessing of Wind
items.description: GM's Blessing of Wind on the map where your character is for 30 min. Enter a message of your choice.

items.name: GM's Blessing of Precision
items.description: GM's Blessing of Precision on the map where your character is for 30 min. Enter a message of your choice.
